title: cestichis foliosa
intro: Cestichis foliosa, also known as the forest fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Gesneriaceae family. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cestichis foliosa include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and treat skin infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
